(** *Integers mod p *)

(** By Alvaro Pelayo, Vladimir Voevodsky and Michael A. Warren *)

(** December 2011 *)

(** made compatible with the current UniMath library by Ralph Matthes in October 2017 *)

(** Imports *)

Require Import UniMath.PAdics.lemmas.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Preamble.

Unset Kernel Term Sharing. (** for quicker proof-checking, approx. by factor 10 *)

Local Open Scope hz_scope.

(** * I. Divisibility and the division algorithm *)

Definition hzdiv0 : hz -> hz -> hz -> UU :=
  fun n m k => n * k = m.

Definition hzdiv : hrel hz := fun n m => ∃ k : hz, hzdiv0 n m k.


isrefl hzdiv


isrefl hzdiv

x: hz
∃ k : hz, hzdiv0 x x k

  
x: hz
∑ k : hz, hzdiv0 x x k

  
x: hz
hzdiv0 x x 1

  apply hzmultr1.
Defined.

n, m: nat
p: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

  
n, m: nat
hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,
  nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
  × hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,

  × hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

n, m: nat
IHn: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)
hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,
  nattohz (S n) = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
  × hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

IHn: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

    
n, m: nat
IHn: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)
p: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
q':= pr11 (IHn p): hz
∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz (S n) = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

    
n, m: nat
IHn: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)
p: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
q':= pr11 (IHn p): hz
r':= pr21 (IHn p): (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 (IHn p))
∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz (S n) = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

    
n, m: nat
IHn: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)
p: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
q':= pr11 (IHn p): hz
r':= pr21 (IHn p): (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 (IHn p))
f:= pr12 (IHn p): nattohz n =
nattohz m * pr11 (IHn p) + pr21 (IHn p)
∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz (S n) = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)

    
n, m: nat
IHn: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)
p: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
q':= pr11 (IHn p): hz
r':= pr21 (IHn p): (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 (IHn p))
f:= pr12 (IHn p): nattohz n =
nattohz m * pr11 (IHn p) + pr21 (IHn p)
hzleh (r' + 1) (nattohz m)
n, m: nat
IHn: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
→ ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n = nattohz m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m)
p: hzlth 0 (nattohz m)
q':= pr11 (IHn p): hz
r':= pr21 (IHn p): (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 (IHn p))

(* A test of the division algorithm for non-negative integers: *)

hzneq 0 1


hzneq 0 1

  
hzneq (nattohz 0) 1

  
hzneq (nattohz 0) (nattohz 1)

  
natnegpaths 0 1

  
f: 0%nat = 1%nat
∅

  
f: 0%nat = 1%nat
1 < 1

  
f: 0%nat = 1%nat
i: 0 < 1
1 < 1

  
f: 0%nat = 1%nat
i: 0 < 0
0 < 0

  assumption.
Defined.

hzneq 0 (1 + 1)

hzneq (nattohz 0) (nattohz 1 + nattohz 1)

  
hzneq (nattohz 0) (nattohz (1 + 1))

  
natnegpaths 0 (1 + 1)

  
natneq (1 + 1) 0
x: natneq (1 + 1) 0
natnegpaths 0 (1 + 1)

  
natneq (1 + 1) 0
 
1 + 1 > 0

    
true = true

    apply idpath. 
x: natneq (1 + 1) 0
natnegpaths 0 (1 + 1)

  
x: natneq (1 + 1) 0
f: 0%nat = (1 + 1)%nat
∅

∅

f: 2 = 0%nat
∅

  
x: natneq (1 + 1) 0
f: 2 = 0%nat
natneq (1 + 1) 2
x: natneq (1 + 1) 0
f: 2 = 0%nat
y: natneq (1 + 1) 2

natneq (1 + 1) 2

natneq (1 + 1) 0

    assumption. 
x: natneq (1 + 1) 0
f: 2 = 0%nat
y: natneq (1 + 1) 2
∅

  
x: natneq (1 + 1) 0
f: 2 = 0%nat
y: ∅
∅

  assumption.
Defined.

1 < 2

Defined.

(*
Eval lazy in hzabsval ( pr1 ( pr1 ( divalgorithmnonneg 1 ( 1 + 1 ) testlemma21 ) ) ).
Eval lazy in hzabsval ( pr1 ( pr1 ( divalgorithmnonneg ( 5 ) ( 1 + 1 ) testlemma21 ) ) ).
Eval lazy in hzabsval ( pr2 ( pr1 ( divalgorithmnonneg ( 5 ) ( 1 + 1 ) testlemma21 ) ) ).

Eval lazy in hzabsval ( pr1 ( pr1 ( divalgorithmnonneg 18 9 testlemma9 ) ) ).
Eval lazy in hzabsval ( pr2 ( pr1 ( divalgorithmnonneg 18 9 testlemma9 ) ) ).
*)

m_neg: hzlth m 0

hzlth m 0

n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
∑ qr : hz × hz,
n = m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')

      
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m

a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
∑ qr : hz × hz,
n = m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')

      
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
∑ qr : hz × hz,
n = m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')

nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
∑ qr : hz × hz,
n = m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')

nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')

R:= - m - r: hz

n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
n =
m * pr1 (make_dirprod Q R) + pr2 (make_dirprod Q R)
× hzleh 0 (pr2 (make_dirprod Q R))
  × hzlth (pr2 (make_dirprod Q R)) (nattohz m')

n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
- nattohz n' = m * Q + R

n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0

a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz

n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
- nattohz n' = m * (q + 1) + (- m - r)

             
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0

f: nattohz m' = - m

p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
- (nattohz m' * pr11 a + pr21 a) =
m * (q + 1) + (- m - r)

             
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
- (nattohz m' * q + pr21 a) = m * (q + 1) + (- m - r)

             
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
- (nattohz m' * q + r) = m * (q + 1) + (- m - r)

             
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
- (nattohz m' * q) + - r = m * (q + 1) + (- m - r)

             
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
(- nattohz m' * q)%ring + - r =
m * (q + 1) + (- m - r)

             
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
(- (- m)%hz * q)%ring + - r = m * (q + 1) + (- m - r)

             
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0

f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
(m * q)%ring + - r = m * (q + 1) + (- m - r)

             
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')

r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
(m * q)%ring + - r =
(m * q + m * 1%hz)%ring + (- m - r)

n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
f1: - nattohz n' = m * Q + R
(- - n)%ring =
m * pr1 (make_dirprod Q R) + pr2 (make_dirprod Q R)

           exact ( pathscomp0 f0 f1 ).
        
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat

f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
hzleh 0 (pr2 (make_dirprod Q R))
× hzlth (pr2 (make_dirprod Q R)) (nattohz m')

r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
u: hzlth r (- m)
hzleh (- m + m) (pr2 (make_dirprod Q (- m - r)))

              
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
u: hzlth r (- m)
hzleh (- m + m) (- m - r)

r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
less: hzlth 0 r
u: hzlth r (- m)
hzleh m (- r)

n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat

f: nattohz m' = - m

p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
equal: 0 = r
∑ qr : hz × hz,
n = m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
 
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat

nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
equal: 0 = r
n =
m * pr1 (make_dirprod q 0) + pr2 (make_dirprod q 0)
× hzleh 0 (pr2 (make_dirprod q 0))
  × hzlth (pr2 (make_dirprod q 0)) (nattohz m')

n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0

nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
equal: 0 = r
- nattohz n' = m * q + 0

f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
equal: 0 = r
f1: - nattohz n' = m * q + 0
(- - n)%ring =
m * pr1 (make_dirprod q 0) + pr2 (make_dirprod q 0)

                assumption.

p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0

m':= hzabsval m: nat

nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
equal: 0 = r
f1: - nattohz n' = m * q + 0
(- - n)%ring =
m * pr1 (make_dirprod q 0) + pr2 (make_dirprod q 0)

           exact ( pathscomp0 f0 f1 ).
        
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
n_neg: hzlth n 0
m_neg: hzlth m 0
n':= hzabsval n: nat
m':= hzabsval m: nat
f: nattohz m' = - m
f0: - - n = - nattohz n'
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz m')
a:= divalgorithmnonneg n' m' p': ∑ qr : hz × hz,
nattohz n' = nattohz m' * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr) × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz m')
q:= pr11 a: hz
r:= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
Q:= q + 1: hz
R:= - m - r: hz
equal: 0 = r
hzleh 0 (pr2 (make_dirprod q 0))
× hzlth (pr2 (make_dirprod q 0)) (nattohz m')

  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval m))
q':= pr11 a: hz
r':= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
f0: n = - - n
f1: - - n = - nattohz (hzabsval n)
less: hzlth 0 r'
n =
m * (- q' - 1) +
pr2 (make_dirprod (- q' - 1) (m - r'))

less: hzlth 0 r'

f31: - (m * 1) = - m
- (m * 1) = - m

nattohz (hzabsval n) =
nattohz (hzabsval m) * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr)
  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval m))
q':= pr11 a: hz
r':= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
f0: n = - - n
f1: - - n = - nattohz (hzabsval n)
less: hzlth 0 r'
hzlth (- r') 0

∑ qr : hz × hz,

m_neg: hzlth m 0
p': hzlth 0 (nattohz (hzabsval m))

× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr)
  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval m))
q':= pr11 a: hz
r':= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
f0: - m * q' = - (m * q')
- (m * q') = m * - q'

  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval m))
q':= pr11 a: hz
r':= pr21 a: (λ _ : hz, hz) (pr11 a)
nattohz (hzabsval m) * q' + r' = m * q' + r'

q', r': hz

p: hzneq 0 m

p: hzneq 0 m

greater: hzgth r' r
e: hzlth 0 (r' - r)
hzlth (nattohz (hzabsval (r' - r)))
  (nattohz (hzabsval m))

          
n, m: hz
p: hzneq 0 m
q', r': hz
f': n = m * q' + r'
p1p2p2t: ¬ hzgth 0 r'
p2p2p2t: hzlth r' (nattohz (hzabsval m))
q, r: hz
f: n = m * q + r
p1p2p2dae: ¬ hzgth 0 r
p2p2p2dae: hzlth r (nattohz (hzabsval m))
h0: m * (q - q') = r' - r
v: hzabsval m ≤ hzabsval (r' - r)
∨ hzabsval (r' - r) = 0%nat
P: isaprop (r' = r)
left: hzabsval m ≤ hzabsval (r' - r)
greater: hzgth r' r
hzlth 0 (r' - r)

h0: m * (q - q') = r' - r
v: hzabsval m ≤ hzabsval (r' - r)
∨ hzabsval (r' - r) = 0%nat
P: isaprop (r' = r)
left: hzabsval m ≤ hzabsval (r' - r)
lesseq: hzleh r' r
less: hzlth r' r
hzlth r (nattohz (hzabsval m))
 exact p2p2p2dae.

p1p2p2dae: ¬ hzgth 0 r
p2p2p2dae: hzlth r (nattohz (hzabsval m))
h: r' = r
m * q + r = m * q' + r

  (n =
   m * pr1 (make_dirprod q r) + pr2 (make_dirprod q r)
   × hzleh 0 (pr2 (make_dirprod q r))
     × hzlth (pr2 (make_dirprod q r))
         (nattohz (hzabsval m)))

  assumption.
Defined.

Definition hzquotientmod ( p : hz ) ( x : hzneq 0 p ) : hz -> hz :=
  fun n : hz => pr1 ( pr1 ( divalgorithmexists n p x ) ).

Definition hzremaindermod ( p : hz ) ( x : hzneq 0 p ) : hz -> hz :=
  fun n : hz => pr2 ( pr1 ( divalgorithmexists n p x ) ).

Definition hzdivequationmod ( p : hz ) ( x : hzneq 0 p ) ( n : hz ) :
  n = p * ( hzquotientmod p x n ) + ( hzremaindermod p x n ) :=
  pr1 ( pr2 ( divalgorithmexists n p x ) ).

Definition hzleh0remaindermod ( p : hz ) ( x : hzneq 0 p ) ( n : hz ) :
  hzleh 0 ( hzremaindermod p x n ) :=
  pr1 ( pr2 ( pr2 ( divalgorithmexists n p x ) ) ).

Definition hzlthremaindermodmod ( p : hz ) ( x : hzneq 0 p ) ( n : hz ) :
  hzlth ( hzremaindermod p x n ) ( nattohz ( hzabsval p ) ) :=
  pr2 ( pr2 ( pr2 ( divalgorithmexists n p x ) ) ).

(*
Eval lazy in hzabsval ( ( ( hzquotientmod ( 1 + 1 ) testlemma2
( 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 ) ) ) ).
Eval lazy in hzabsval ( ( ( hzremaindermod ( 1 + 1 ) testlemma2
( 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 ) ) ) ).
*)

(** * II. QUOTIENTS AND REMAINDERS *)

Definition isaprime ( p : hz ) : UU :=
  hzlth 1 p ×
  forall m : hz, hzdiv m p -> m = 1 ∨ m = p.


p: hz
isaprop (isaprime p)


p: hz
isaprop (isaprime p)

  
p: hz
isaprop (isaprime p)

  
p: hz
isofhlevel 1 (hzlth 1 p)
p: hz
isofhlevel 1 (∏ m : hz, hzdiv m p → m = 1 ∨ m = p)

  
p: hz
isofhlevel 1 (hzlth 1 p)
 apply ( hzlth 1 p ).
  
p: hz
isofhlevel 1 (∏ m : hz, hzdiv m p → m = 1 ∨ m = p)
 
p: hz
∏ t : hz, isofhlevel 1 (hzdiv t p → t = 1 ∨ t = p)

    
p, m: hz
isofhlevel 1 (hzdiv m p → m = 1 ∨ m = p)

    
p, m: hz
isofhlevel 1 (m = 1 ∨ m = p)

    apply ( m = 1 ∨ m = p ).
Defined.

    apply ( pr1 x ).
Defined.

a = m * q + r
× hzleh 0 r × hzlth r (nattohz (hzabsval m))
→ q = hzquotientmod m x a × r = hzremaindermod m x a

pr11 k = hzquotientmod m x a

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, q, r: hz
d: a = m * q + r
× hzleh 0 r × hzlth r (nattohz (hzabsval m))
k:= make_dirprod q r,, d: ∑ qr : hz × hz,
a = m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr)
  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval m))
f: k = pr1 (divalgorithm a m x)
pr111 (divalgorithm a m x) = hzquotientmod m x a

    apply idpath.
  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, q, r: hz
d: a = m * q + r
× hzleh 0 r × hzlth r (nattohz (hzabsval m))
k:= make_dirprod q r,, d: ∑ qr : hz × hz,
a = m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr)
  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval m))
f: k = pr1 (divalgorithm a m x)
r = hzremaindermod m x a
 
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, q, r: hz
d: a = m * q + r
× hzleh 0 r × hzlth r (nattohz (hzabsval m))
k:= make_dirprod q r,, d: ∑ qr : hz × hz,
a = m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr)
  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval m))
f: k = pr1 (divalgorithm a m x)
pr21 k = hzremaindermod m x a

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, q, r: hz
d: a = m * q + r
× hzleh 0 r × hzlth r (nattohz (hzabsval m))
k:= make_dirprod q r,, d: ∑ qr : hz × hz,
a = m * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr)
  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval m))
f: k = pr1 (divalgorithm a m x)
pr211 (divalgorithm a m x) = hzremaindermod m x a

    apply idpath.
Defined.

Definition hzqrtestq ( m : hz ) ( x : hzneq 0 m ) ( a q r : hz )
  ( d : a = ( m * q ) + r ×
        ( hzleh 0 r × hzlth r ( nattohz ( hzabsval m ) ) ) ) :=
  pr1 ( hzqrtest m x a q r d ).

Definition hzqrtestr ( m : hz ) ( x : hzneq 0 m ) ( a q r : hz )
  ( d : a = ( m * q ) + r ×
        ( hzleh 0 r × hzlth r ( nattohz ( hzabsval m ) ) ) ) :=
  pr2 ( hzqrtest m x a q r d ).

p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p *
(hzquotientmod p x a + hzquotientmod p x c +
 hzquotientmod p x
   (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)) +
hzremaindermod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p *
(hzquotientmod p x a + hzquotientmod p x c +
 hzquotientmod p x
   (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)) +
hzremaindermod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p *
(hzquotientmod p x a + hzquotientmod p x c +
 hzquotientmod p x
   (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)) +
hzremaindermod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p * hzquotientmod p x a + p * hzquotientmod p x c +
p *
hzquotientmod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c) +
hzremaindermod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p * hzquotientmod p x a + p * hzquotientmod p x c +
(p *
 hzquotientmod p x
   (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c) +
 hzremaindermod p x
   (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c))

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p * hzquotientmod p x a + p * hzquotientmod p x c +
(hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p * hzquotientmod p x a +
(p * hzquotientmod p x c +
 (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c))

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p * hzquotientmod p x a +
(p * hzquotientmod p x c +
 (hzremaindermod p x c + hzremaindermod p x a))

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p * hzquotientmod p x a +
(p * hzquotientmod p x c + hzremaindermod p x c +
 hzremaindermod p x a)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p * hzquotientmod p x a + (c + hzremaindermod p x a)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p * hzquotientmod p x a + (hzremaindermod p x a + c)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c =
p * hzquotientmod p x a + hzremaindermod p x a + c

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
a + c = a + c

  apply idpath.
Defined.

x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzleh 0
  (hzremaindermod p x
     (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c))
× hzlth
    (hzremaindermod p x
       (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c))
    (nattohz (hzabsval p))

hzlth
  (hzremaindermod p x
     (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c))
  (nattohz (hzabsval p))

  (hzremaindermod p x
     (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c))
 apply hzleh0remaindermod.
  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzlth
  (hzremaindermod p x
     (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c))
  (nattohz (hzabsval p))
 apply hzlthremaindermodmod.
Defined.


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzremaindermod p x (a + c) =
hzremaindermod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzremaindermod p x (a + c) =
hzremaindermod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzremaindermod p x (a + c) =
hzremaindermod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzremaindermod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c) =
hzremaindermod p x (a + c)

  apply ( hzqrtest p x ( a + c ) _ _ ( make_dirprod ( hzqrandpluseq p x a c )
                                                   ( hzqrandplusineq p x a c ) ) ).
Defined.


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzquotientmod p x (a + c) =
hzquotientmod p x a + hzquotientmod p x c +
hzquotientmod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzquotientmod p x (a + c) =
hzquotientmod p x a + hzquotientmod p x c +
hzquotientmod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)

x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzquotientmod p x (a + c) =
hzquotientmod p x a + hzquotientmod p x c +
hzquotientmod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, c: hz
hzquotientmod p x a + hzquotientmod p x c +
hzquotientmod p x
  (hzremaindermod p x a + hzremaindermod p x c) =
hzquotientmod p x (a + c)

  apply ( hzqrtest p x ( a + c ) _ _ ( make_dirprod ( hzqrandpluseq p x a c )
                                                   ( hzqrandplusineq p x a c ) ) ).
Defined.


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m *
(hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
 hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
 hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)) +
hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m *
(hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
 hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
 hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)) +
hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m *
(hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
 hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
 hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)) +
hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * (hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b) +
m *
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * (hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(m *
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) +
 hzremaindermod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b))

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * (hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * (hzquotientmod m x a * (hzquotientmod m x b * m)) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (hzquotientmod m x b * m) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
 m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b)) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(m * (hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b) +
 m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a)) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(m * hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
 m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a)) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(hzremaindermod m x a * m * hzquotientmod m x b +
 m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a)) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(hzremaindermod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
 m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a)) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m * hzquotientmod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
(m * hzquotientmod m x a + hzremaindermod m x a) *
(m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(m * (hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a) +
 hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(m * (hzquotientmod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) +
 hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(m * hzquotientmod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b +
 hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
(m * hzquotientmod m x a + hzremaindermod m x a) *
hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b) +
a * hzremaindermod m x b

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
a * (m * hzquotientmod m x b + hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b = a * b

  apply idpath.
Defined.


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzleh 0
  (hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b))
× hzlth
    (hzremaindermod m x
       (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b))
    (nattohz (hzabsval m))

  (hzremaindermod m x

  (nattohz (hzabsval m))
 apply hzlthremaindermodmod.
Defined.


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x (a * b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x (a * b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x (a * b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) =
hzquotientmod m x (a * b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m *
(hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
 hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
 hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)) +
hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)
× hzleh 0
    (hzremaindermod m x
       (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b))
  × hzlth
      (hzremaindermod m x
         (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b))
      (nattohz (hzabsval m))

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m *
(hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
 hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
 hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)) +
hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzleh 0
  (hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b))
× hzlth
    (hzremaindermod m x
       (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b))
    (nattohz (hzabsval m))

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
a * b =
m *
(hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
 hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
 hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)) +
hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)
 apply hzqrandtimeseq.
  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzleh 0
  (hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b))
× hzlth
    (hzremaindermod m x

    (nattohz (hzabsval m))
 apply hzqrandtimesineq.

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
n: hz
hzremaindermod m is n =
m * pr1 (make_dirprod 0 (hzremaindermod m is n)) +
pr2 (make_dirprod 0%ring (hzremaindermod m is n))


m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
n: hz
hzremaindermod m is n =
m * pr1 (make_dirprod 0 (hzremaindermod m is n)) +
pr2 (make_dirprod 0%ring (hzremaindermod m is n))

n: hz
hzremaindermod m is n =
m * pr1 (make_dirprod 0 (hzremaindermod m is n)) +
pr2 (make_dirprod 0%ring (hzremaindermod m is n))

is: hzneq 0 m
n: hz
hzremaindermod m is n = m * 0 + hzremaindermod m is n

  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
n: hz
hzremaindermod m is n = 0 + hzremaindermod m is n

is: hzneq 0 m
n: hz
hzremaindermod m is n = hzremaindermod m is n

  apply idpath.
Defined.

hzleh 0%ring (hzremaindermod m is n)
× hzlth (hzremaindermod m is n) (nattohz (hzabsval m))

is: hzneq 0 m
n: hz
hzremaindermod m is (hzremaindermod m is n) =
hzremaindermod m is n

is: hzneq 0 m
n: hz
hzremaindermod m is (hzremaindermod m is n) =
hzremaindermod m is n

× hzleh 0 (hzremaindermod m is n)

      (nattohz (hzabsval m))

 apply hzqrandremainderineq.

× hzlth (hzremaindermod m is n) (nattohz (hzabsval m))

(** * III. THE EUCLIDEAN ALGORITHM *)

Definition iscommonhzdiv ( k n m : hz ) :=
  hzdiv k n × hzdiv k m.


k, n, m: hz
isaprop (iscommonhzdiv k n m)


k, n, m: hz
isaprop (iscommonhzdiv k n m)

  
k, n, m: hz
isaprop (iscommonhzdiv k n m)

  
k, n, m: hz
isofhlevel 1 (iscommonhzdiv k n m)

  
k, n, m: hz
isofhlevel 1 (hzdiv k n)
k, n, m: hz
isofhlevel 1 (hzdiv k m)

  
k, n, m: hz
isofhlevel 1 (hzdiv k n)
 apply hzdiv.
  
k, n, m: hz
isofhlevel 1 (hzdiv k m)
 apply hzdiv.
Defined.

Definition hzgcd ( n m : hz ) : UU :=
  ∑ k : hz, iscommonhzdiv k n m ×
            forall l : hz, iscommonhzdiv l n m -> hzleh l k.


k, n, m: hz
isaprop
  (iscommonhzdiv k n m
   × (∏ l : hz, iscommonhzdiv l n m → hzleh l k))


k, n, m: hz
isaprop
  (iscommonhzdiv k n m
   × (∏ l : hz, iscommonhzdiv l n m → hzleh l k))

  
k, n, m: hz
isaprop
  (iscommonhzdiv k n m
   × (∏ l : hz, iscommonhzdiv l n m → hzleh l k))

  
k, n, m: hz
isofhlevel 1 (iscommonhzdiv k n m)
k, n, m: hz
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ l : hz, iscommonhzdiv l n m → hzleh l k)

  
k, n, m: hz
isofhlevel 1 (iscommonhzdiv k n m)
 apply isapropiscommonhzdiv.
  
k, n, m: hz
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ l : hz, iscommonhzdiv l n m → hzleh l k)
 
k, n, m: hz
∏ t : hz,
isofhlevel 1 (iscommonhzdiv t n m → hzleh t k)

    
k, n, m, t: hz
isofhlevel 1 (iscommonhzdiv t n m → hzleh t k)

    
k, n, m, t: hz
isofhlevel 1 (hzleh t k)

    apply hzleh.
Defined.


n, m: hz
isaprop (hzgcd n m)


n, m: hz
isaprop (hzgcd n m)

  
n, m: hz
isaprop (hzgcd n m)
 
n, m: hz
k, l: hzgcd n m
isofhlevel 0 (k = l)

  
n, m: hz
k, l: hzgcd n m
isofhlevel 2 (hzgcd n m)
n, m: hz
k, l: hzgcd n m
aux: isofhlevel 2 (hzgcd n m)
isofhlevel 0 (k = l)

  
n, m: hz
k, l: hzgcd n m
isofhlevel 2 (hzgcd n m)
 
n, m: hz
k, l: hzgcd n m
isofhlevel 2 hz
n, m: hz
k, l: hzgcd n m
∏ x : hz,

(* Euclidean algorithm for calculating the GCD of two numbers (here
assumed to be natural numbers ( m <= n )):

gcd ( n , m ) := 1. if m = 0, then take n.  2. if m \neq 0, then
  divide n = q * m + r and take g := gcd ( m , r ).  *)

× (∏ l : hz,
   iscommonhzdiv l (nattohz n) (nattohz 0)
   → hzleh l (nattohz n))

hzgcd m n = hzgcd (- m) n

Defined.

Definition gcd ( n m : hz ) ( i : hzneq 0 n ) : hz :=
  pr1 ( pr1 ( euclideanalgorithm n m i ) ).

Definition gcdiscommondiv ( n m : hz ) ( i : hzneq 0 n ) :
  iscommonhzdiv (gcd n m i) n m :=
  pr1 ( pr2 ( pr1 ( euclideanalgorithm n m i ) ) ).

Definition gcdisgreatest ( n m : hz ) ( i : hzneq 0 n ):
  ∏ l : hz, iscommonhzdiv l n m → hzleh l (gcd n m i) :=
  pr2 ( pr2 ( pr1 ( euclideanalgorithm n m i ) ) ).

∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),

q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz

  (nattohz m)

              exact ( transportf ( fun x =>

                                 ( hzlthremaindermodmod ( nattohz m ) p ( nattohz n ) )

hzabsval (hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n)) <
m

          exact ( transportf ( fun x =>

                             ( hzabsvalandnattohz m ) ii ).

pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m

pr1 ab * nattohz m + pr2 ab * nattohz (hzabsval r)

gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m

E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,

pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat

p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz

a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 (make_dirprod b (a - b * q)) * nattohz n +
pr2 (make_dirprod b (a - b * q)) * nattohz m

a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
hzdiv
  (gcd (nattohz m)
     (hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n)) p)
  (hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n))

               apply ( pr2 ( gcdiscommondiv ( nattohz m )
                               ( hzremaindermod ( nattohz m ) p ( nattohz n ) ) p ) ).

∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,

pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

x: natneq m 0

q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
hzdiv (gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p)
  (nattohz m)
 apply gcdiscommondiv.

∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
nattohz (hzabsval r) =
nattohz m * hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n) +
hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n) -
q * nattohz m

        
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
nattohz (hzabsval r) =
nattohz m * q +
hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n) -
q * nattohz m

∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),

pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz

f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
nattohz (hzabsval r) =
nattohz m * q + r - q * nattohz m

        
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
nattohz (hzabsval r) =
r + nattohz m * q - q * nattohz m

        
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =

g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =

nattohz (hzabsval r) =
r + nattohz m * q + - (q * nattohz m)

∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz

g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =

E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
nattohz (hzabsval r) =
r + (q * nattohz m + - (q * nattohz m))

        (* Coq hangs on the following command:
        change (q * nattohz m + - (q * nattohz m)) with
               (q * nattohz m - (q * nattohz m)).
         *)
        
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)

q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz

f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
nattohz (hzabsval r) = r + 0

gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =

q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz

f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =

g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =

E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz

a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =

g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
hzgeh r 0

          apply ( hzleh0remaindermod ( nattohz m ) p ( nattohz n ) ).
        
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
r + 0 = r + (q * nattohz m + - (q * nattohz m))
 
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
0 = q * nattohz m + - (q * nattohz m)

          (* Coq again hangs on the following command:
          change (q * nattohz m + - (q * nattohz m)) with
               (q * nattohz m - (q * nattohz m)).
          *)
          
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
q * nattohz m - q * nattohz m =
q * nattohz m + - (q * nattohz m)

          apply idpath.
      
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
h: nattohz (hzabsval r) = nattohz n - q * nattohz m
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r) =
b * nattohz n + (a - b * q) * nattohz m

      
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
h: nattohz (hzabsval r) = nattohz n - q * nattohz m
a * nattohz m + b * (nattohz n - q * nattohz m) =
b * nattohz n + (a - b * q) * nattohz m

      
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
h: nattohz (hzabsval r) = nattohz n - q * nattohz m
a * nattohz m + b * (nattohz n + - (q * nattohz m)) =
b * nattohz n + (a - b * q) * nattohz m

      
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
h: nattohz (hzabsval r) = nattohz n - q * nattohz m
a * nattohz m +
(b * nattohz n + b * (- (q * nattohz m))%hz)%ring =
b * nattohz n + (a - b * q) * nattohz m

      
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type

x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
h: nattohz (hzabsval r) = nattohz n - q * nattohz m
a * nattohz m + (b * nattohz n)%ring +
(b * (- (q * nattohz m))%hz)%ring =
b * nattohz n + (a - b * q) * nattohz m

      
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
h: nattohz (hzabsval r) = nattohz n - q * nattohz m
(b * nattohz n)%ring + a * nattohz m +
(b * (- (q * nattohz m))%hz)%ring =
b * nattohz n + (a - b * q) * nattohz m

      
E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
m: nat
x: natneq m 0
y: ∏ m0 : nat, m0 < m → E m0
n: nat
i: hzneq 0 (nattohz n)
p: hzneq 0 (nattohz m)
r:= hzremaindermod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
q:= hzquotientmod (nattohz m) p (nattohz n): hz
p': hzabsval r < m
a, b: hz
f: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
a * nattohz m + b * nattohz (hzabsval r)
g: gcd (nattohz m) (nattohz (hzabsval r)) p =
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i
h: nattohz (hzabsval r) = nattohz n - q * nattohz m
(b * nattohz n)%ring + a * nattohz m +
(- (b * (q * nattohz m)%hz))%ring =
b * nattohz n + (a - b * q) * nattohz m

E:= λ m : nat,

h: nattohz (hzabsval r) = nattohz n - q * nattohz m
(b * nattohz n)%ring +

E:= λ m : nat,
∏ (n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m: nat → Type
goal: ∏ x : nat, E x
∏ (m n : nat) (i : hzneq 0 (nattohz n)),
∑ ab : hz × hz,
gcd (nattohz n) (nattohz m) i =
pr1 ab * nattohz n + pr2 ab * nattohz m

  apply goal.
Defined.

left_m: hzlth 0 m
hzdiv m m

gcd n m i =
(a * nattohz (hzabsval n))%ring + (b * - m)%ring

Defined.

(** * V. Z/nZ *)


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
n, m: hz
isaprop (hzremaindermod p x n = hzremaindermod p x m)


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
n, m: hz
isaprop (hzremaindermod p x n = hzremaindermod p x m)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
n, m: hz
isaprop (hzremaindermod p x n = hzremaindermod p x m)

  apply isasethz.
Defined.


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
hrel hz


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
hrel hz

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
n, m: hz
hProp

  exact ( make_hProp ( hzremaindermod p x n = hzremaindermod p x m )
                    ( hzmodisaprop p x n m ) ).
Defined.


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
isrefl (hzmod p x)


p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
isrefl (hzmod p x)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
isrefl (hzmod p x)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∏ x0 : hz, hzmod p x x0 x0

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
n: hz
hzmod p x n n

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
n: hz
make_hProp
  (hzremaindermod p x n = hzremaindermod p x n)
  (hzmodisaprop p x n n)

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
n: hz
a: hzremaindermod p x n = hzremaindermod p x n
make_hProp
  (hzremaindermod p x n = hzremaindermod p x n)
  (hzmodisaprop p x n n)

  apply a.
Defined.

p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∏ a b c : setwithbinop1 hz,
(hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) a b
→ (hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) (c + a)%addmonoid
    (c + b)%addmonoid
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∏ a b c : setwithbinop1 hz,
(hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) a b
→ (hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) (a + c)%addmonoid
    (b + c)%addmonoid

    
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∏ a b c : setwithbinop1 hz,
(hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) a b
→ (hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) (c + a)%addmonoid
    (c + b)%addmonoid
 apply hzmodcompatplusl.
    
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∏ a b c : setwithbinop1 hz,
(hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) a b
→ (hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) (a + c)%addmonoid
    (b + c)%addmonoid
 apply hzmodcompatplusr.
  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
isbinophrel (hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x)
 
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∏ a b c : setwithbinop2 hz,
(hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) a b
→ (hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) (c + a)%addmonoid
    (c + b)%addmonoid
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∏ a b c : setwithbinop2 hz,
(hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) a b
→ (hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) (a + c)%addmonoid
    (b + c)%addmonoid

    
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∏ a b c : setwithbinop2 hz,
(hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) a b
→ (hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) (c + a)%addmonoid
    (c + b)%addmonoid
 apply hzmodcompatmultl.
    
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∏ a b c : setwithbinop2 hz,
(hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) a b
→ (hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x) (a + c)%addmonoid
    (b + c)%addmonoid
 apply hzmodcompatmultr.
Defined.

Definition hzmodp ( p : hz ) ( x : hzneq 0 p ) :=
  commringquot ( hzmodisringeqrel p x ).


p: hz

isdecprop (hzmodisringeqrel p x a b)

x: hzneq 0 p
a, b: hz
hzmodisringeqrel p x a b ⨿ ¬ hzmodisringeqrel p x a b
× isaprop (hzmodisringeqrel p x a b)

l: hzremaindermod p x a = hzremaindermod p x b

l: hzremaindermod p x a = hzremaindermod p x b

p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, b: hz
l: hzremaindermod p x a = hzremaindermod p x b
((hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x),,
 (hzmodcompatplusl p x,, hzmodcompatplusr p x),,
 hzmodcompatmultl p x,, hzmodcompatmultr p x) a b
⨿ ¬ ((hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x),,
     (hzmodcompatplusl p x,, hzmodcompatplusr p x),,
     hzmodcompatmultl p x,, hzmodcompatmultr p x) a b
× isaprop
    (((hzmod p x,, hzmodiseqrel p x),,
      (hzmodcompatplusl p x,, hzmodcompatplusr p x),,
      hzmodcompatmultl p x,, hzmodcompatmultr p x) a b)

a, b: hz
l: hzremaindermod p x a = hzremaindermod p x b
(hzremaindermod p x a = hzremaindermod p x b)
⨿ (hzremaindermod p x a != hzremaindermod p x b)
× isaprop
    (hzremaindermod p x a = hzremaindermod p x b)

x: hzneq 0 p
a, b: hz
l: hzremaindermod p x a = hzremaindermod p x b
(hzremaindermod p x a = hzremaindermod p x b)
⨿ (hzremaindermod p x a != hzremaindermod p x b)

p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
acommring

x: hzneq 0 p
acommring

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
acommring

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
∑ R : apart (hzmodp p x),
isbinopapart R op1 × isbinopapart R op2

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
isbinopapart
  (neq (hzmodp p x),,
   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x)) op1
× isbinopapart
    (neq (hzmodp p x),,
     deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x)) op2

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
isbinopapart
  (neq (hzmodp p x),,
   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x)) op1

   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x)) op1
 
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p

  (neq (hzmodp p x),,
   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x)) op1
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p

   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x)) op1

isbinopapartl

   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x)) op1
 
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, b, c: hzmodp p x
q: pr1
  (neq (hzmodp p x),,
   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x))
  (a + b)%ring (a + c)%ring
pr1
  (neq (hzmodp p x),,
   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x)) b c

      
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, b, c: hzmodp p x
q: pr1
  (neq (hzmodp p x),,
   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x))
  (a + b)%ring (a + c)%ring
b != c

      
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, b, c: hzmodp p x
q: (a + b)%ring != (a + c)%ring
b != c

      
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, b, c: hzmodp p x
q: (a + b)%ring != (a + c)%ring
f: b = c
∅

      
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, b, c: hzmodp p x
q: (a + b)%ring != (a + c)%ring
f: b = c
(a + b)%ring = (a + c)%ring

      
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, b, c: hzmodp p x
q: (a + b)%ring != (a + c)%ring
f: b = c
(a + c)%ring = (a + c)%ring

      apply idpath.
    
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
isbinopapartr
  (neq (hzmodp p x),,
   deceqtoneqapart (isdeceqhzmodp p x)) op1

     (lemmas.hzabsvalneq0 p x)): ∑ qr : hz × hz,

× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr)
  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval p))

  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval p))
s: e = pr1 (divalgorithm a p x)

x: hzneq 0 p

  (make_dirprod (isreflhzleh 0)
     (lemmas.hzabsvalneq0 p x)): ∑ qr : hz × hz,
a = p * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr)
  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval p))
s: e = pr1 (divalgorithm a p x)
w:= base_paths (pr1 (divalgorithm a p x))
  (make_dirprod k 0,,
   make_dirprod f'
     (make_dirprod (isreflhzleh 0)
        (lemmas.hzabsvalneq0 p x))) (! s): pr11 (divalgorithm a p x) =
pr1
  (make_dirprod k 0,,
   make_dirprod f'
     (make_dirprod (isreflhzleh 0)
        (lemmas.hzabsvalneq0 p x)))
make_hProp (hzremaindermod p x a = 0) v

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a: hz
y: hzdiv p a
v: isaprop (hzremaindermod p x a = 0)
k: hz
f: p * k = a
f': a = p * k + 0
e:= make_dirprod k 0,,
make_dirprod f'
  (make_dirprod (isreflhzleh 0)
     (lemmas.hzabsvalneq0 p x)): ∑ qr : hz × hz,
a = p * pr1 qr + pr2 qr
× hzleh 0 (pr2 qr)
  × hzlth (pr2 qr) (nattohz (hzabsval p))
s: e = pr1 (divalgorithm a p x)
w:= base_paths (pr1 (divalgorithm a p x))
  (make_dirprod k 0,,
   make_dirprod f'
     (make_dirprod (isreflhzleh 0)
        (lemmas.hzabsvalneq0 p x))) (! s): pr11 (divalgorithm a p x) =
pr1
  (make_dirprod k 0,,
   make_dirprod f'
     (make_dirprod (isreflhzleh 0)
        (lemmas.hzabsvalneq0 p x)))
make_hProp (pr21 (divalgorithmexists a p x) = 0) v

  apply ( maponpaths ( fun z : hz × hz => pr2 z ) w ).
Defined.

     (hzremaindermod p x p * hzremaindermod p x a) +

  (hzremaindermod p x (0 * hzremaindermod p x a) +
   hzremaindermod p x b) = hzremaindermod p x b

hzremaindermod p x b

  (hzremaindermod p x 0 + hzremaindermod p x b) =
hzremaindermod p x b

a, b: hz
f: p * a + b =
p * (a + hzquotientmod p x b) +
hzremaindermod p x b
hzremaindermod p x (0 + hzremaindermod p x b) =
hzremaindermod p x b

p * (a + hzquotientmod p x b) +

hzremaindermod p x b

  
p: hz
x: hzneq 0 p
a, b: hz
f: p * a + b =
p * (a + hzquotientmod p x b) +
hzremaindermod p x b

  apply idpath.
Defined.

setquotpr R (a * b)%ring

          (acommring_hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y))
          (setquotpr
             (hzmodisringeqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) x))
     (int
        (setquotpr
           (hzmodisringeqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) x)))

    
p: hz
y: isaprime p
int: ∏ x0 : acommring_hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),
isaprop
((x0 # 0)%ring → multinvpair (acommring_hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) x0)
a: hz
pr1
  (make_hProp
     ((setquotpr
         (hzmodisringeqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a # 0)%ring
      → multinvpair
          (acommring_hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y))
          (setquotpr
             (hzmodisringeqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a))
     (int
        (setquotpr
           (hzmodisringeqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a)))

a: hz
setquotpr
  (hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),,
   hzmodiseqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a != 0%ring
→ multinvpair (hzmodp p (isaprimetoneq0 y))
    (setquotpr
       (hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),,
        hzmodiseqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a)

p: hz
y: isaprime p
int: ∏ x0 : acommring_hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),
isaprop
((x0 # 0)%ring → multinvpair (acommring_hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) x0)
a: hz
q: setquotpr
  (hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),,
   hzmodiseqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a != 0%ring
q': ¬ hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y) a 0
multinvpair (hzmodp p (isaprimetoneq0 y))

p: hz
y: isaprime p
int: ∏ x0 : acommring_hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),
isaprop
((x0 # 0)%ring → multinvpair (acommring_hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) x0)
a: hz
q: setquotpr
  (hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),,
   hzmodiseqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a != 0%ring
q': ¬ hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y) a 0
(setquotpr (hzmodisringeqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y))
   (pr1 (hzmodprimeinv p (isaprimetoneq0 y) y a q')) +
 setquotpr
   (hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),,
    hzmodiseqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a)%addmonoid =
0%addmonoid
× (setquotpr
     (hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),,
      hzmodiseqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a +
   setquotpr (hzmodisringeqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y))
     (pr1 (hzmodprimeinv p (isaprimetoneq0 y) y a q')))%addmonoid =
  0%addmonoid

y: isaprime p
int: ∏ x0 : acommring_hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),

    hzmodiseqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y))
   (pr21 (bezoutstrong a p (isaprimetoneq0 y))) *

   (hzmod p (isaprimetoneq0 y),,
    hzmodiseqrel p (isaprimetoneq0 y)) a)%ring =
